title: Carry out spot welding
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out spot welding demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for spot welding

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret welding information1.3 Select and inspect materials for repairs and replacements for quality1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.6 Prepare work area and plan work to conduct and test spot welds, minimise waste, and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret welding information1.3 Select and inspect materials for repairs and replacements for quality1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.6 Prepare work area and plan work to conduct and test spot welds, minimise waste, and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret welding information1.3 Select and inspect materials for repairs and replacements for quality1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select and check tools and equipment for serviceability1.6 Prepare work area and plan work to conduct and test spot welds, minimise waste, and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for spot welding

elements.title: Carry out spot welding activities

pcs.text: Prepare surfaces for spot welding and apply anti-corrosion coatings prior to spot welding2.2 Set up and adjust welding equipment for specific welding job requirement following OEM or authorised agency repair guidelines2.3 Perform and destructive test sample spot welds 2.4 Carry out welding using welding equipment according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Complete spot welding without causing damage to components or systems2.6 Inspect completed spot welds for quality, and rectify identified faults as required according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare surfaces for spot welding and apply anti-corrosion coatings prior to spot welding2.2 Set up and adjust welding equipment for specific welding job requirement following OEM or authorised agency repair guidelines2.3 Perform and destructive test sample spot welds 2.4 Carry out welding using welding equipment according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Complete spot welding without causing damage to components or systems2.6 Inspect completed spot welds for quality, and rectify identified faults as required according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare surfaces for spot welding and apply anti-corrosion coatings prior to spot welding2.2 Set up and adjust welding equipment for specific welding job requirement following OEM or authorised agency repair guidelines2.3 Perform and destructive test sample spot welds 2.4 Carry out welding using welding equipment according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Complete spot welding without causing damage to components or systems2.6 Inspect completed spot welds for quality, and rectify identified faults as required according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out spot welding activities

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
